summary: Created missing customer post master-data rows and attached frozen workbook primary posts to 12 users via res.users.sc_post_id.

verification.command: docker exec -i sc-backend-odoo-dev-odoo-1 odoo shell -d sc_demo bootstrap_customer_user_primary_posts assertion
